reference: Hi, I read your question. Your child is recovering from a cold. He has a bad odor coming from his ear, which means your baby may have an ear infection. It is sometimes common after a cold to have an ear infection, so please show a pediatrician as soon as possible.
text: Hi, I read your question. Your child is recovering from a cold. He has a bad odor coming from his ear, which means your baby may have an ear infection. It is sometimes common after a cold to have an ear infection, so please show a pediatrician as soon as possible.
